summary: Backend refactoring and new persistence endpoints verified. All 19 backend tests pass. Server starts correctly with modular imports from db/, models/, services/. New CRUD endpoints for Net Worth History, Debt Management, Insurance Coverage, and Revenue Tracking all working. Frontend pages (DecisionDashboard, LifeTimeline, ClientCRM, AIAdvisor, NetWorthTrend, DebtPaydown, InsuranceGap, RevenueBilling) all load correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Backend health endpoint works after refactoring
Root API endpoint returns correct message
Tax rates endpoint works (confirms modular imports from services/tax_constants.py)
GET /api/trends/net-worth/{household_id} - returns historical net worth data (demo when empty)
POST /api/trends/net-worth/snapshot - saves net worth snapshot to MongoDB
GET /api/trends/net-worth/{household_id}?months=6 - respects months parameter
GET /api/planning/debts/{household_id} - returns debts list (demo when empty)
POST /api/planning/debts - saves debt item to MongoDB
GET /api/planning/debts/{household_id} - returns saved debt from database
DELETE /api/planning/debts/{debt_id} - deletes debt item
GET /api/planning/insurance/{household_id} - returns insurance coverage (demo when empty)
POST /api/planning/insurance - saves insurance coverage to MongoDB
GET /api/planning/insurance/{household_id} - returns saved insurance from database
GET /api/billing/revenue/{adviser_id} - returns revenue history (generated when empty)
GET /api/billing/revenue/{adviser_id}?months=6 - respects months parameter
Revenue data values validated - totals match component sums
POST /api/analyze/tax - tax calculation still works after refactoring
POST /api/analyze/loan - loan calculation still works after refactoring
GET /api/enterprise/practice-overview - practice overview works
Frontend: Decision Dashboard page loads
Frontend: Net Worth Trend page loads at /net-worth-trend
Frontend: Debt Paydown page loads at /debt-paydown
Frontend: Insurance Gap page loads at /insurance-gap
Frontend: Life Timeline page loads at /life-timeline
Frontend: Client CRM page loads at /client-crm
Frontend: AI Advisor page loads at /ai-advisor
Frontend: Revenue & Billing page loads at /revenue-billing
critical_code_review_comments: Backend modular refactoring successful - db/, models/, services/ modules imported correctly
New persistence endpoints return demo/generated data when MongoDB is empty - acceptable for MVP
Frontend pages use MOCKED data generated locally for charts - not connected to new backend persistence endpoints yet
seed_data_creation: Test data with TEST_ prefix created during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete with modular structure at /app/backend/db/, /app/backend/models/, /app/backend/services/. New persistence endpoints added: GET/POST /api/trends/net-worth, GET/POST/DELETE /api/planning/debts, GET/POST /api/planning/insurance, GET /api/billing/revenue. All endpoints return demo data when MongoDB is empty. Frontend pages use MOCKED frontend-generated data - not yet connected to these new backend endpoints. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_persistence_endpoints.py covers all new endpoints.
mocked_apis_confirmed: Net Worth History - returns generated data when no real data in MongoDB
Debt Management - returns demo debts when no real data in MongoDB
Insurance Coverage - returns demo coverage when no real data in MongoDB
Revenue Tracking - returns generated revenue data when no real data in MongoDB
